title: Bit selection with add operation generates wrong result

features.name: 2D unpacked array indexing with sized literal add expression
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array with bit-select indexing using an add expression where one operand is a sized literal

features.name: array bit-select with overflow-triggering index expression
features.description: Code should include array indexing where the computed index equals the array size (overflow case at boundary value)
